goal: Add app-wide dark mode with persisted preference, system default, and no-flash shell behavior.
inputs: Existing shell and design token scaffold
Current status badge and card components
constraints: Do not add external theme libraries
Use CSS variables and a tiny client provider
Keep shell layout unchanged apart from the theme toggle
done_criteria: Light and dark themes both render cleanly
System theme is respected when user preference is system
No flash of incorrect theme on first paint
escalation_rules: Escalate only if a shared shell file needs broader redesign
